name: JoAi: Identity Verification

description.en: Submit your identity information to unlock payouts. Required once per account.
description.de: Reiche deine Identitätsdaten ein, um Auszahlungen freizuschalten. Einmalig pro Konto erforderlich.
description.es: Submit your identity information to unlock payouts. Required once per account.
description.fr: Submit your identity information to unlock payouts. Required once per account.
description.ro: Submit your identity information to unlock payouts. Required once per account.
description.it: Submit your identity information to unlock payouts. Required once per account.

bot: Guide the user through submitting their identity for payout verification. Explain that this is required once to comply with legal obligations and unlock payouts.

description.en: Your full legal name as it appears on your ID.
description.de: Dein vollständiger rechtlicher Name, wie er auf deinem Ausweis steht.
description.es: Your full legal name as it appears on your ID.
description.fr: Your full legal name as it appears on your ID.
description.ro: Your full legal name as it appears on your ID.
description.it: Your full legal name as it appears on your ID.

inputs.name: Country
inputs.bot: Ask for the country naturally. Convert the answer to the two-letter ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code (e.g. Austria → AT, Germany → DE) before submitting.

description.en: Your full residential address including city and postal code.
description.de: Deine vollständige Wohnadresse mit Stadt und Postleitzahl.
description.es: Your full residential address including city and postal code.
description.fr: Your full residential address including city and postal code.
description.ro: Your full residential address including city and postal code.
description.it: Your full residential address including city and postal code.

description.en: Your tax identification number or VAT ID. For individuals: national tax ID. For businesses: VAT number.
description.de: Deine Steueridentifikationsnummer oder USt-IdNr. Für Privatpersonen: Steuer-ID. Für Unternehmen: UID-Nummer.
description.es: Your tax identification number or VAT ID. For individuals: national tax ID. For businesses: VAT number.
description.fr: Your tax identification number or VAT ID. For individuals: national tax ID. For businesses: VAT number.
description.ro: Your tax identification number or VAT ID. For individuals: national tax ID. For businesses: VAT number.
description.it: Your tax identification number or VAT ID. For individuals: national tax ID. For businesses: VAT number.

description.en: Your company or business name, if applicable.
description.es: Your company or business name, if applicable.
description.fr: Your company or business name, if applicable.
description.ro: Your company or business name, if applicable.
description.it: Your company or business name, if applicable.

success.en: Identity submitted. We will review your information and notify you once approved.
success.de: Identität eingereicht. Wir prüfen deine Angaben und benachrichtigen dich nach der Freigabe.
success.es: Identity submitted. We will review your information and notify you once approved.
success.fr: Identity submitted. We will review your information and notify you once approved.
success.ro: Identity submitted. We will review your information and notify you once approved.
success.it: Identity submitted. We will review your information and notify you once approved.

error.en: Failed to submit identity information. Please try again.
error.de: Identitätsdaten konnten nicht eingereicht werden. Bitte erneut versuchen.
error.es: Failed to submit identity information. Please try again.
error.fr: Failed to submit identity information. Please try again.
error.ro: Failed to submit identity information. Please try again.
error.it: Failed to submit identity information. Please try again.
